headline: $1M Crypto Injection Fuels Michigan Primary Race

headline: Southwest Soars 10% on Q2 Earnings Beat

article.title: Southwest Beats Estimates on Strong Demand, Premium Spending
article.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. provided an outlook for the full year that exceeded Wall Street’s projections, citing robust travel demand and spending on the carrier’s premium products, even as operating revenue and passenger revenue for the second quarter missed analysts’ estimates.
